items.label: Associate
items.name: Brian Heder
items.desc: Boatyard owner. Operational contact for marine logistics.

items.label: Associate
items.name: Cal Hampton
items.desc: Conspiracy theorist with documented proximity to active operations.

items.label: Protagonist
items.name: Jason Duval
items.desc: Leonida native. Former military. Drug running history in the Keys corridor.

items.label: Protagonist
items.name: Lucia Caminos
items.desc: Recently paroled. The tactical lead. First confirmed female protagonist in the HD Universe.

items.label: Associate
items.name: Lori Heder
items.desc: Brian Heder's third wife. Co-operator of the boatyard in the Leonida Keys.

items.label: Veteran
items.name: Raul Bautista
items.desc: Seasoned bank robber. Product runs through the Port Gellhorn corridor.

items.label: Mogul
items.name: Boobie Ike
items.desc: Vice City nightclub and recording studio empire. Street-to-boardroom.

items.label: Manager
items.name: Dre'Quan Priest
items.desc: Only Raw Records. Works directly with Boobie Ike.

items.label: Mechanic
items.name: Wyman
items.desc: Vehicle parts and fencing. Operational support from the shop floor.

items.label: Artist
items.name: Bae-Lux
items.desc: Rapper. Real Dimez crew. Vice City nightlife circuit.

items.label: Artist
items.name: DWNPLY
items.desc: Vice City rapper. Collaborated with Real Dimez on their breakout hit.

items.label: Politician
items.name: Erin Henshaw
items.desc: Local politician. Running for mayor near Ambrosia. Campaign signs visible statewide.

items.label: Artist
items.name: Roxy
items.desc: Rapper. Real Dimez crew. Vice City nightlife circuit.

items.label: Civilian
items.name: Rudi
items.desc: The Leonida Man. Viral video. Climbing out of a moving pickup on the Leonida highway.

items.label: Official
items.name: Stefanie
items.desc: Correctional social worker. Lucia's parole officer.
